name: instagram-collector-agent
description: Instagram Lead Engine - Collector Agent: Hashtag Discovery, Competitor Post Discovery, and Comment Scraping

hashtags.description: List of hashtags to discover posts from

warnings: This agent requires manual Instagram login
Headful browser mode only - no headless automation
Randomized delays are enforced to respect platform ToS
Agent will stop on challenge or rate limit detection
DO NOT use for automated DM sending or ToS violations
